title: Echinocodon draco
taxonomy: Echinocodon draco is a genus of flowering plants in the family Staphylocactaceae. However, some sources may classify it as part of the family Staphylocactaceae's subgroup or even a separate family altogether due to the ongoing debates in plant taxonomy. intro: Echinocodon draco, also known as the "Dragon Flower," is a plant species native to the Himalayas and Southeast Asia, belonging to the family Campanulaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it beneficial for treating various health conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues.
